---
name: 🔧 Suggest a Resource
about: Suggest a library, tool, or resource to be added to ReactToolkit
title: "[Resource] "
labels: resource-request
assignees: ""
---

## Resource Details

**Name**
<!-- The official name of the library or tool -->

**URL**
<!-- The main URL (homepage, docs, or npm page) -->

**GitHub Repository** *(optional)*
<!-- e.g. https://github.com/org/repo -->

**Category**
<!-- Pick the most fitting one or suggest a new one -->
- [ ] State Management
- [ ] UI Components
- [ ] Routing
- [ ] Data Fetching
- [ ] Forms
- [ ] Animation
- [ ] Styling
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

---

## About this resource

**What does it do?**
<!-- One or two sentences describing what it does and the problem it solves -->

**Why should it be added to ReactToolkit?**
<!-- What makes it worth including? e.g. widely adopted, unique approach, solves a common pain point -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] This resource is specifically useful for React projects
- [ ] The URL is publicly accessible
- [ ] This resource is not already in ReactToolkit
